acidAbsorption00.name: Acid Absorption
acidAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within acidic environments. Its Acid resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

acidSpit00000000.name: Acid Spit
acidSpit00000000.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acid.

Acid Spit.name: Acid Spit
Acid Spit.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits a glob of acidic bile at a target within 20 feet.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

acidSpray0000000.name: Acid Spray
acidSpray0000000.description: The creature has salivary glands which produce a caustic acidic spray.

Acid Spray.name: Acid Spray
Acid Spray.description:
The creature expels a spray of acidic bile in a 10 foot fan.

On a Critical Hit, this attack causes the @Condition[corroding] condition for 3 Turns.

amorphous0000000.name: Amorphous
amorphous0000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may move through a space as narrow as 1 inch in diameter without any penalty to its Stride. It gains a bonus to Dodge equal to half its Toughness score and is immune to the @Condition[restrained] condition.

aqueousCamouflag.name: Aqueous Camouflage
aqueousCamouflag.description: While fully submerged in water or liquids, @ref[actor.name]{this creature} has @Advantage[2] on Stealth checks.

aqueousTransmiss.name: Aqueous Transmission
aqueousTransmiss.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to move instantaneously through water.

Aqueous Transmission.name: Aqueous Transmission
Aqueous Transmission.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is within water, it can instantaneously transport itself to any unoccupied space within the same body of water up to 120 feet away. It does not need to be able to see the destination to make this Move.

bestialSenses000.name: Bestial Senses
bestialSenses000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has finely honed senses and is particularly perceptive of their environment, all Awareness checks gain +2 Boons.

bloodSense000000.name: Blood Sense
bloodSense000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can precisely sense any blooded creature within 20 feet which does not have all its hit points. Any weapon or skill attack against a wounded creature does not suffer Banes that would normally apply if the creature were @Condition[blinded].

bondedMind000000.name: Bonded Mind
bondedMind000000.description: The mind of a @ref[actor.name]{creature} with this talent is inextricably bound to other members of its group. It is capable of instantaneous telepathic communication with any other @ref[actor.taxonomy.name]{creature of its taxonomy} within 60 feet.

burnout000000000.name: Burnout
burnout000000000.description: Steam-powered constructs store dangerous amounts of superheated steam within their bodies that, if not discharged safely, can cause serious injury.

Burnout.name: Burnout
Burnout.description: The @ref[actor.name]{construct} ruptures, spilling forth a blast of flame and smoke, attacking the Reflex of each target within the radius and dealing Fire damage. Those who take damage from this attack are @Condition[blinded] for 3 turns.

burrower00000000.name: Burrower
burrower00000000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has a supernatural ability to rapidly burrow through solid surfaces which are not entirely impermeable.

Additionally, it can compress its body to pass through apertures that can accommodate ¼ of its Size.

Explosive Emergence.name: Explosive Emergence
Explosive Emergence.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emerges from a subterranean position with surprising and sudden force. This action may only be activated immediately the creature leaves the @Condition[burrowing] state.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} erupts to Strike against all enemies within its weapon range with an Empowered attack.

clingingGrip0000.name: Clinging Grip
clingingGrip0000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to cling to vertical or overhead surfaces with exceptional grip or adhesion. This creature can avoid falling as long as they are adjacent to any solid surface which can reasonably support them.

Dropping Strike.name: Dropping Strike
Dropping Strike.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can drop from overhead to Strike a creature below it. The target creature suffers an Empowered attack which, if successful, knocks them @Condition[prone] in addition to dealing damage.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can suffer falling damage from this attack only if it misses its target.

coldAbsorption00.name: Cold Absorption
coldAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within frigid environments. Its Cold resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

corruptingDeathB.name: Corrupting Death Burst
corruptingDeathB.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} dies, it explodes in a volatile burst of corrupting energy.

Corrupting Death Burst.name: Corrupting Death Burst
Corrupting Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], it explodes in a pulse of spores that deal Corruption damage, attacking the Fortitude defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect and upon critical success afflicting them with the @Condition[decaying] condition for 3 rounds.

corruptionAbsorp.name: Corruption Absorption
corruptionAbsorp.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to shrug off the effects of Death magic. Its Corruption resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

echolocation0000.name: Echolocation
echolocation0000.description:
@ref[actor.name]{This creature} perceives the world through the emission of sonic pulses that detect shapes with precision, allowing it to locate creatures that are moving or otherwise emitting sound, up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover. If the creature is @Condition[deafened], this sense may not be used.

A creature detected using @ref[name] is treated as visible for the purposes of actions which require you to see your target.

electricityAbsor.name: Electricity Absorption
electricityAbsor.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to take lightning blasts in stride. Its Electricity resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

elusiveFlight000.name: Elusive Flight
elusiveFlight000.description: This @ref[actor.name]{creature} is especially elusive while in flight, able to swoop in and out of combat without provoking any Disengagement. It can be engaged if it lands upon the ground and Disengagement may apply if it attempts to return to flight.

extendedBreath00.name: Extended Breath
extendedBreath00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can hold its breath for 15 minutes.

falseAppearance0.name: False Appearance
falseAppearance0.description: While it remains motionless, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is indistinguishable from some other object or material.

fireAbsorption00.name: Fire Absorption
fireAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an exceptional ability to thrive within scorching environments. Its Fire resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

glider0000000000.name: Glider
glider0000000000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can control its movement while falling and may perform the Move action up to a maximum distance of its Stride for each 20 feet that it falls.

If it spends Action to Move in this way, it does not suffer falling damage upon landing.

gloomSight000000.name: Gloom Sight
gloomSight000000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can gaze into the gloom of total darkness and see normally. Magical darkness does not impede the creature's vision.

System Development: This feature needs automation to configure vision and detection modes that are unaffected by magical darkness.

glowingBody00000.name: Glowing Body
glowingBody00000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} emits non-magical bright light in a 15-foot radius and dim light in a 30 foot radius.

graveMark0000000.name: Grave Mark
graveMark0000000.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} achieves a Critical Hit with a melee attack, it leaves a baleful Grave Mark upon its target.

Grave Mark.name: Grave Mark
Grave Mark.condition: When achieving a Critical Hit with a melee attack.
Grave Mark.description:
After achieving a Critical Hit with a melee attack, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks the target's Willpower defense, leaving a Grave Mark upon a success that inflicts the @Condition[exhausted] condition that persists until the target completes a Rest.

If a humanoid creature bearing a Grave Mark dies while under the effects of the mark, it rises from death on its subsequent Turn as a @UUID[Compendium.crucible.taxonomy.Item.ghoul00000000000]{Ghoul}.

horrificCritical.name: Horrific Critical
horrificCritical.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} delivers savage and grotesque blows that evoke fear within any who behold them.

Horrific Critical.name: Horrific Critical
Horrific Critical.condition: Immediately after the creature achieves a Critical Hit with a melee attack.
Horrific Critical.description:
When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} achieves a Critical Hit using a melee attack it may exaggerate the blow in a way that evokes fear within those who behold the strike.

All the enemies within 30 feet who can see the creature face a Harmless attack against their Willpower or become @Condition[frightened] for 3 Turns.

immuntableForm00.name: Immutable Form
immuntableForm00.description: The @ref[actor.name] is immune to any spell or effect which alters its physical form.

lightningBurst00.name: Lightning Burst
lightningBurst00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel powerful voltaic blast.

Lightning Burst.name: Lightning Burst
Lightning Burst.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels a blast of lighting in a 15 foot blast, attacking the Reflex of each target within that range and and dealing Electricity damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

lightningSpit000.name: Lightning Spit
lightningSpit000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel minor voltaic discharge.

Lightning Spit.name: Lightning Spit
Lightning Spit.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits a small bolt of lightning at a target creature within 20 feet, attacking its Reflex and dealing Electricity damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

lightningSpray00.name: Lightning Spray
lightningSpray00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel powerful voltaic discharge.

Lightning Spray.name: Lightning Spray
Lightning Spray.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels a bolt of lighting in a 30 foot ray that is 4 feet wide, attacking the Reflex of each target along that path and dealing Electricity damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[shocked] condition for 3 Turns.

naturalInvisibil.name: Natural Invisibility
naturalInvisibil.description: By some organic or arcane aspect of its physiology, @ref[actor.name]{this creature] possesses the ability to become completely invisible.

Natural Invisibility.name: Natural Invisibility
Natural Invisibility.description: You become @Condition[invisible] and cannot be detected using sight-based perception. You cannot be directly targeted by any action. This effect remains active for 10 minutes or until any non-Movement action is taken.

necroticBite0000.name: Necrotic Bite
necroticBite0000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} tears into flesh with a maw that is corrupted by pestilence and undeath.

Necrotic Bite.name: Necrotic Bite
Necrotic Bite.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks with a pestilent bite that is Empowered and deals Corruption damage.

On a Critical Success the attack causes the @Condition[decaying] condition for 3 Turns.

noxiousSpit00000.name: Noxious Spit
noxiousSpit00000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} produces a salivary toxin that it can expel in a projected globule.

Noxious Spit.name: Noxious Spit
Noxious Spit.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} spits globule of toxin at a target creature within 20 feet, attacking its Reflex and dealing Poison damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 3 Turns.

noxiousSpray0000.name: Noxious Spray
noxiousSpray0000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to produce and expel toxic discharge in a projected ray.

Noxious Spray.name: Noxious Spray
Noxious Spray.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} expels toxic discharge in a 30 foot ray that is 4 feet wide, attacking the Reflex of each target along that path and dealing Poison damage.

On a Critical Hit the attack causes the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 3 Turns.

oozeCorrodeWeapo.name: Corrode Weapon
oozeCorrodeWeapo.description: The internal corrosive metabolism of the @ref[actor.name]{ooze} threatens to dissolve metal weapons that strike it.

Corrode Weapon.name: Corrode Weapon
Corrode Weapon.condition: Struck in melee by a weapon made of metal.
Corrode Weapon.description:
When struck by a melee weapon made of metal, the ooze attempts to consume the weapon itself, potentially breaking it.

This attack is Harmless, but if successful the Quality of the weapon used in the attack is downgraded by one tier. On a Critical Success or if the weapon is already Shoddy, the weapon becomes entirely Broken. Enchanted weapons are protected against this effect.

oozeMultiply0000.name: Multiply
oozeMultiply0000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{ooze} grows rapidly, increasing in health and size.

Multiply.name: Multiply
Multiply.description: The ooze's cells rapidly multiply as the creature grows. Its Size increases by 1 and its Health increases by its Toughness value.

oozeSubdivide000.name: Subdivide
oozeSubdivide000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{ooze} can divide itself into multiple parts, each an independent copy of the original.

Subdivide.name: Subdivide
Subdivide.description:
The ooze's cells rapidly divide and the creature splits in two! The original creature and its clone equally divide its remaining Health. The Size of each resulting creature is decreased by 1.

If in combat, the new creature acts as a Summon and joins at Initiative 1. This Action may only be used if the creature has Size larger than 2. The created ooze never has rank superior to Normal.

packhunter000000.name: Pack Hunter
packhunter000000.description:
This creature is a pack hunter, relying on its allies to flank and harrass a target to render it exposed to further harm.

This creature doubles number of Boons awarded from attacking a Flanked enemy.

pouncingStrike00.name: Pouncing Strike
pouncingStrike00.description: This creature lunges forward, putting its whole weight behind a leaping strike.

Pouncing Strike.name: Pouncing Strike
Pouncing Strike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move that brings the @ref[actor.name]{creature} at least 10 feet closer to its target. If the creature was above the target, this attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

psychicAbsorptio.name: Psychic Absorption
psychicAbsorptio.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is exceptionally unyielding to attacks on its mind. Its Psychic resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

radiantAbsorptio.name: Radiant Absorption
radiantAbsorptio.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the chaotic force of light. Its Radiant resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

radiantDeathBurs.name: Radiant Death Burst
radiantDeathBurs.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} dies, it explodes in a volatile burst of radiant energy.

Radiant Death Burst.name: Radiant Death Burst
Radiant Death Burst.description: When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], it explodes in a pulse of Radiant energy which attacks the Fortitude defense of all nearby creatures that fail to resist the effect and upon critical success afflicting them with the @Condition[irradiated] condition for 3 rounds.

rakingTalons0000.name: Raking Talons
rakingTalons0000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks rapidly with its talons, dealing multiple raking blows against a single target.

Raking Talons.name: Raking Talons
Raking Talons.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks swiftly with both talons.

If at least one attack results in a Critical Success, it inflicts the @Condition[bleeding] condition for 2 Rounds.

repugnantPustule.name: Repugnant Pustules
repugnantPustule.description: A malodorous cloud hangs about this creature like a pall, the rank noxious scent that can only come from active decay. Striking this creature is likely to release repugnant and corrupting essence.

Repugnant Pustules.name: Repugnant Pustules
Repugnant Pustules.description:
When the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is hit by a Strike, it may partially burst to release a spray of sickening fluid that deals Corruption damage. This action scales with Toughness and targets the Reflex defense of any creature within 3 feet.

On a Critical Success, the affected target becomes temporarily @Condition[diseased] for 3 Rounds.

restlessDead0000.name: Restless Dead
restlessDead0000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature}'s life is sustained by necromantic magic or otherworldly forces. When it would be considered @Condition[dead] it is instead @Condition[incapacitated].

After the conclusion of combat, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} may begin to perform the Recover action, regaining consciousness after the recovery is complete. Recovery in this fashion may be prevented in one of the following ways:

  • The creature was incapacitated by a type of damage for which it is Vulnerable.

  • The magical forces which caused it to rise as undead are disrupted, countered, or otherwise dispelled.

  • The creature's body is destroyed to a degree that it can no longer maintain its physical form.

restrainingChomp.name: Restraining Chomp
restrainingChomp.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its powerful jaws to bite and hold a target with a powerful chomp.

Restraining Chomp.name: Restraining Chomp
Restraining Chomp.description: The creature chomps down upon its target. If the attack is successful and the target is equal or lesser in Size, the target is also Restrained until this creature chooses to release it or the restraint is otherwise broken. Only one target may be restrained by this action at a given time.

sacrificeSelf000.name: Sacrifice Self
sacrificeSelf000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} may intervene to take a blow instead of an adjacent ally.

Sacrifice Self.name: Sacrifice Self
Sacrifice Self.condition: A nearby ally is targeted by a hostile action.
Sacrifice Self.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} reacts, performing a Movement up to their Stride to interpose itself between a nearby ally and some source of harm which it can perceive.

The @ref[actor.name]{creature} becomes @Condition[dead], destroyed in their sacrifice, but the triggering action causes no effects to its original target.

selfrepair000000.name: Self-Repair
selfrepair000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{construct} activates internal repairing mechanisms to mitigate damage it has taken.

Self-Repair.name: Self-Repair
Self-Repair.description: The construct recovers its Toughness value in Health and immediately ends a single status condition of its choice that is currently affecting it.

servitor00000000.name: Servitor
servitor00000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} serves the will of another and maintains a connection to that master that allows the transmission or messages or even the sharing of senses between the servitor and its controller.

Servitor Sending.name: Servitor Sending
Servitor Sending.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can contact its master, sending inaudible communication which is instantaneously received by its controller as long as that other creature is capable of receiving messages.

shadowGait000000.name: Shadow Gait
shadowGait000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is able to step into and out of shadow itself to move in nightmarish and unpredictable ways.

Shadow Gait.name: Shadow Gait
Shadow Gait.description: While in dim light or darkness, the @ref[actor.name] can meld into shadow to disappear from view. It may Move and reappear within a different area which is also dim light or darkness. This is a Displace movement which provokes no disengagement.

slipperyForm0000.name: Slippery Form
slipperyForm0000.description: This creature is permanently slippery, giving it the ability to elude capture by physical restraints.

Slippery Escape.name: Slippery Escape
Slippery Escape.description: The creature uses it slippery form to escape restraints, immediately ending the Restrained condition.

steamVent0000000.name: Steam Vent
steamVent0000000.description: Steam-powered constructs store dangerous amounts of superheated steam within their bodies that, if not discharged safely, can cause serious injury.

Steam Vent.name: Steam Vent
Steam Vent.description: Superheated steam bursts forth from inside the steam-powered construct in a burst of searing damage, knocking back those standing too close and leaving them @Condition[prone] .

sunlightWeakness.name: Sunlight Weakness
sunlightWeakness.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to sunlight.

Sunlight Weakness.name: Sunlight Weakness
Sunlight Weakness.description: The creature suffers banes to all actions when exposed to sunlight.

swallow000000000.name: Swallow
swallow000000000.description: @Ref[actor.name]{This creature} has the capability of swallowing creatures smaller than them whole, though only one creature may be affected by this action at a time.

Swallow.name: Swallow
Swallow.description:
You swallow a target enemy, effectively removing that foe from combat. The swallowed target is @Condition[blinded] and @Condition[restrained] until released.

If you take Severe damage, are Wounded, or are rendered @Condition[incapacitated] you regurgitate the swallowed creature.

swarm00000000000.name: Swarm
swarm00000000000.description:
This adversary is a group of many identical creatures that operate as a single swarming throng of foes.

  • Maximum Health is doubled.

  • Against any single-target source of damage, the swarm gains additional Resistance equal to its Toughness.

  • The swarm's Size decreases as its Health is depleted until reaching a minimum Size of 2.

swoopingStrike00.name: Swooping Strike
swoopingStrike00.description: This @ref[actor.name]{creature} swoops from high above into a diving attack.

Swooping Strike.name: Swooping Strike
Swooping Strike.description:
This attack may be used after a Move which descended at least 10 feet towards the target. The attack gains +1 Boon per 10 feet of elevation decrease in that movement.

If this attack is a Critical Hit, the target of the attack is immediately knocked @Condition[prone].

tailSweep0000000.name: Tail Sweep
tailSweep0000000.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can whip its heavy tail across the battlefield with terrible force.

Tail Sweep.name: Tail Sweep
Tail Sweep.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} sweeps its heavy tail in a circular arc, striking all creatures within range. On a Critical Hit, affected targets become @Condition[staggered] for until the end of their next turn.

thermalVision000.name: Thermal Vision
thermalVision000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{Creature} perceives the world through differences in temperature with precision, allowing it to locate creatures whose bodily temperature deviates from ambient norms.

This allows detection of creatures whose body temperatures are Gelid, Cool, Warm, or Boiling up to 60 feet away as long as they are not behind total cover and as long as the @ref[actor.name]{creature} is not @Condition[blinded] or @Condition[incapacitated]. A creature detected in this way is treated as visible for the purposes of Actions which require sight.

thrash0000000000.name: Thrash
thrash0000000000.description: Once the @ref[actor.name]{creature} has an enemy restrained, it will thrash violently dealing terrible blows to the grasped victim.

Thrash.name: Thrash
Thrash.condition: The target is Restrained by this creature.
Thrash.description: The creature deals Deadly damage to a target that it currently has Restrained.

tramplingCharge0.name: Trampling Charge
tramplingCharge0.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} uses its prodigious size to charge forward, trampling smaller creatures that stand in its way.

Trampling Charge.name: Trampling Charge
Trampling Charge.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} moves forward up to twice its Stride, attacking the Reflex defense of all creatures in its path. Targets who are half the creature's size or smaller are @Condition[stunned] until the end of their next turn as they are slammed aside.

tuskCharge000000.name: Tusk Charge
tuskCharge000000.description: The Boar lowers its head and charges with frantic speed, it's tusks protruding from beneath a drooling gullet.

Tusk Charge.name: Tusk Charge
Tusk Charge.description: Charge in a direct line up to your Stride and make a Strike against the first creature you encounter. If successful, the target is knocked Prone.

unnaturalSight00.name: Magical Sight
unnaturalSight00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} has otherworldly sight that makes it especially aware of dangers or opportunities. It gains +2 Boons to any Awareness check and can see @Condition[invisible] creatures.

Venomous Bite.name: Venomous Bite
Venomous Bite.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} attacks, injects toxin which, if successful, inflicts the @Condition[poisoned] condition for 6 Turns.

voidAbsorption00.name: Void Absorption
voidAbsorption00.description: The @ref[actor.name]{creature} is no stranger to the orderly force of darkness. Its Void resistance is doubled and if that resistance would reduce an amount of damage below zero, the negative amount is received as Healing instead.

webSpinner000000.name: Web Spinner
webSpinner000000.description:
The @ref[actor.name]{creature} can create powerfully adhesive webbing. It ignores any movement restrictions or restraints otherwise caused by webbing.

While in contact with a web, the @ref[actor.name]{creature} knows the precise location of any other creature in contact with the same web.

Web Spinner.name: Web Spinner
Web Spinner.description: The creature can spend 10 minutes to spin a new new section of webbing that covers a 5-foot area.
